subcodes.first_line: O Ḥakím Áqá Ján! That which was promised in the Holy Books hath been made manifest. He is Jehovah, He is the Comforter, He is the Spirit of Truth
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حکیم آقاجان ظاهر شد آنچه در کتب موعود بود اوست یهوه و اوست معزی و اوست
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @prophecy and fulfillment
